members.name: chanIndex
members.description: `me.chanIndex` can be used in any parameter to give a different value for each channel being generated, for example `[3, 4, 5][me.chanIndex]`.

members.name: inputVal
members.description: The current value of the input sample being evaluated. To access channels from other inputs use the operator's inputs. Example: me.inputs[1]['chan4'] will access chan4 of the second input.

members.name: sampleIndex
members.description: The index of the current sample being evaluated.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the ExpressionCHOP Class wiki page
